name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📱 Environment Information
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 119, Firefox 120, Safari 17] (if applicable)
- **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.11.0]
- **SWE Agent Version**: [e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash]
- **Environment**: [dev/staging/production]

## 📸 Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, error logs, or stack traces to help explain your problem.

```
[Paste error logs or stack traces here]
```

## 🧩 Component Area
Which component is affected? (Check all that apply)
- [ ] API/Backend Services
- [ ] Agent Catalogue
- [ ] UI/Frontend
- [ ] Worker/Queue System
- [ ] Database/Migrations
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization
- [ ] Logging/Monitoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🚀 Possible Solution
If you have suggestions on a fix for the bug, please describe.

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues that may be the same problem
- [ ] I have included all relevant information above
- [ ] I have provided steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have checked the [documentation](docs/README.md) and [troubleshooting guide](docs/setup.md)
